doc.title: git-switchboard
doc.description: Interactive TUI for browsing and checking out git branches
doc.renderedHtml:
Interactive TUI for browsing and checking out git branches

git-switchboard

Options

FlagDescription
-r, --remoteInclude remote branches (default: false)
-a, --author <value...>Filter by author name(s)
--github-token <value>GitHub token for PR enrichment (falls back to GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_TOKEN)
--no-prSkip PR enrichment even if a token is available (default: false)

Keyboard shortcuts

KeyAction
j/k or Up/DownNavigate
EnterCheckout selected branch
rToggle remote branches
aCycle author filter
pProvider status
/Search
q or EscQuit
